mapper.sql: select id, user_id, device_id, type, value, longitude, latitude, state, create_time, update_by, update_time, update_content, location from ueit_exception
mapper.select: SELECT su.age, su.nick_name as nickName, su.sex, su.phonenumber, ueit_exception.* FROM sys_user su JOIN ueit_exception ON su.user_id = ueit_exception.user_id where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into ueit_exception
user_id, device_id, type, value, longitude, latitude, state, create_time, update_by, update_time, update_content, location,
#{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{type}, #{value}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{state}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateContent}, #{location},
mapper.delete:
delete from ueit_exception where id in
#{id}
